decoder_capabilities: Returns real DecodedInstruction values for the executable slice.
Attaches shared common operand descriptors for the active seed slice, including implicit VCC metadata for VOPC destinations.
Normalizes imported arithmetic/control opcodes onto the Mirage alias surface for the new subset.
Decodes S_ADD_U32, S_ADD_I32, and S_SUB_U32 from ENC_SOP2.
Decodes the full local 32-bit signed/unsigned SOPC compare set from ENC_SOPC.
Decodes S_BRANCH, S_CBRANCH_SCC0, S_CBRANCH_SCC1, S_CBRANCH_VCCZ, S_CBRANCH_VCCNZ, S_CBRANCH_EXECZ, and S_CBRANCH_EXECNZ from ENC_SOPP with sign-extended relative deltas.
Decodes S_DCACHE_INV from ENC_SMEM as the first local scalar-memory executable foothold, consuming the full two-dword SMEM route while remaining a nullary cache-hint op on the current path.

Decodes S_PREFETCH_INST, S_PREFETCH_DATA, and S_BUFFER_PREFETCH_DATA from ENC_SMEM as operand-carrying base-address cache-hint seeds, keeping their SBASE, IOFFSET, SOFFSET, and SDATA fields local to the phase-0 path while explicitly tracking 64-bit and 128-bit scalar base descriptors.

Decodes S_PREFETCH_INST_PC_REL and S_PREFETCH_DATA_PC_REL from ENC_SMEM as operand-carrying PC-relative cache-hint seeds, keeping their IOFFSET, SOFFSET, and SDATA fields local to the phase-0 path without widening shared scalar-memory state.

Decodes S_ATC_PROBE and S_ATC_PROBE_BUFFER from ENC_SMEM as operand-carrying scalar cache-probe hints, keeping their SDATA, SBASE, and SOFFSET fields architecture-local while explicitly tracking 64-bit and 128-bit scalar base descriptors on the current path.

Decodes S_LOAD_B32, S_LOAD_B64, S_LOAD_B96, S_LOAD_B128, S_LOAD_B256, S_LOAD_B512, S_LOAD_I8, S_LOAD_U8, S_LOAD_I16, and S_LOAD_U16 from ENC_SMEM as the current real scalar-memory dataflow seeds, keeping 64-bit scalar bases, inline or scalar-register offsets, narrow sign/zero extension, and 32/64/96/128/256/512-bit scalar destinations local to the phase-0 path.

Decodes S_BUFFER_LOAD_B32, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B64, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B96, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B128, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B256, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B512, S_BUFFER_LOAD_I8, S_BUFFER_LOAD_U8, S_BUFFER_LOAD_I16, and S_BUFFER_LOAD_U16 from ENC_SMEM as the matching buffer-backed scalar-memory dataflow seeds, treating the 128-bit resource descriptor as an architecture-local base-address container plus 24-bit ioffset and scalar soffset on the current path.
Decodes SGPR, inline integer, and literal sources for S_MOV_B32 and V_MOV_B32.
Decodes V_READFIRSTLANE_B32 from ENC_VOP1 with a scalar destination descriptor and a vector-register source descriptor on the current wave32-local path.

Decodes V_MOVRELD_B32, V_MOVRELS_B32, V_MOVRELSD_B32, V_MOVRELSD_2_B32, and V_SWAPREL_B32 from ENC_VOP1 with an implicit M0 source descriptor; V_SWAPREL_B32 keeps both explicit VGPR operands read/write on the current wave32-local path.
Decodes V_NOT_B32, V_BFREV_B32, V_CLS_I32, V_CLZ_I32_U32, V_CTZ_I32_B32, and V_CVT_F32_UBYTE0/1/2/3 from ENC_VOP1.
Decodes V_NOP from ENC_VOP1 as a nullary wave32-local no-op on the current seed path.
Decodes V_PIPEFLUSH from ENC_VOP1 as a nullary local control seed on the current path.
Decodes V_MOV_B16 and V_NOT_B16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path, using the current local low-16-bit payload convention without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_PERMLANE64_B32 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path and constrains it to VGPR sources, matching the imported wave32-local consumer shape.

Decodes V_SWAP_B32 and V_SWAP_B16 from ENC_VOP1 as two-operand read/write vector instructions, using shared operand metadata to mark both registers as explicit read/write participants on the current local path.
Decodes V_CVT_F32_I32, V_CVT_F32_U32, V_CVT_U32_F32, V_CVT_I32_F32, V_CVT_FLOOR_I32_F32, and V_CVT_NEAREST_I32_F32 from ENC_VOP1.
Decodes V_CVT_F32_FP8 and V_CVT_F32_BF8 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, using 8-bit OCP E4M3 and E5M2 source descriptors.
Decodes V_CVT_PK_F32_FP8 and V_CVT_PK_F32_BF8 from ENC_VOP1 on the same wide-destination unary path, using packed 2x8-bit source descriptors and vector-pair F32 destinations.
Decodes V_CVT_OFF_F32_I4 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, using the imported signed 4-bit offset-table semantics.

Decodes V_CVT_F32_F16, V_CVT_F16_F32, V_CVT_F16_I16, and V_CVT_F16_U16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, interpreting or materializing F16 values in the low 16 bits without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_CVT_I16_F16 and V_CVT_U16_F16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, materializing low-16-bit integer payloads without widening the shared/common surface.

Decodes V_SAT_PK_U8_I16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, packing the signed low and high 16-bit source halves into saturated unsigned bytes without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_CVT_NORM_I16_F16 and V_CVT_NORM_U16_F16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path, keeping the current local low-16-bit payload convention without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_CVT_I32_I16 and V_CVT_U32_U16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary 32-bit vector path, using the current local low-16-bit source interpretation without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_EXP_F32, V_LOG_F32, V_RCP_F32, V_RCP_IFLAG_F32, V_RSQ_F32, V_SQRT_F32, V_SIN_F32, and V_COS_F32 from ENC_VOP1 on the existing unary 32-bit vector path.
Decodes V_RCP_F64, V_RSQ_F64, and V_SQRT_F64 from ENC_VOP1 with architecture-local wide source and destination descriptors for VGPR pairs.
Decodes V_FREXP_EXP_I32_F32, V_FREXP_MANT_F32, and V_FRACT_F32 from ENC_VOP1 on the existing unary 32-bit vector path.
Decodes V_TRUNC_F32, V_CEIL_F32, V_RNDNE_F32, and V_FLOOR_F32 from ENC_VOP1 on the existing unary 32-bit vector path.
Decodes V_CVT_F64_F32, V_CVT_F64_I32, and V_CVT_F64_U32 from ENC_VOP1 with architecture-local wide vector destination descriptors.
Decodes V_CVT_F32_F64, V_CVT_I32_F64, V_CVT_U32_F64, and V_FREXP_EXP_I32_F64 from ENC_VOP1 with architecture-local wide source descriptors for SGPR/VGPR register pairs.
Decodes V_FREXP_MANT_F64 and V_FRACT_F64 from ENC_VOP1 with architecture-local wide source and destination descriptors for VGPR pairs.
Decodes V_TRUNC_F64, V_CEIL_F64, V_RNDNE_F64, and V_FLOOR_F64 from ENC_VOP1 with architecture-local wide source and destination descriptors for VGPR pairs.
Decodes V_RCP_F16, V_RSQ_F16, V_SQRT_F16, V_EXP_F16, V_LOG_F16, V_SIN_F16, and V_COS_F16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path, using the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention.

Decodes V_FREXP_EXP_I16_F16, V_FREXP_MANT_F16, and V_FRACT_F16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path, keeping exponent results in the low 16 bits and mantissa/fraction results in the local F16 payload convention.
Decodes V_TRUNC_F16, V_CEIL_F16, V_RNDNE_F16, and V_FLOOR_F16 from ENC_VOP1 on the same unary vector path, keeping the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention.
Decodes V_ADD_F16, V_SUB_F16, V_SUBREV_F16, and V_MUL_F16 from ENC_VOP2 on the same binary vector path, using the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention.
Decodes V_FMAC_F16 from ENC_VOP2 as a read/write-destination half-width vector op, reusing the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention without widening the shared/common surface.

Decodes V_FMAMK_F16 and V_FMAAK_F16 from ENC_VOP2 as half-width literal-FMA ops with a required shared trailing literal dword, reusing the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention without widening the shared/common surface.

Decodes V_PK_FMAC_F16 from ENC_VOP2 as a packed-half read/write-destination vector op, using shared packed fragment metadata while keeping the current local packed-F16 payload path architecture-local.

Decodes V_CVT_PK_RTZ_F16_F32 and V_LDEXP_F16 from ENC_VOP2 on the same binary vector path, using the current local F32-to-packed-F16 bridge and low-16-bit F16 plus signed-low-16 exponent payload convention without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_MIN_NUM_F16 and V_MAX_NUM_F16 from ENC_VOP2 on the same binary vector path, using the current local low-16-bit F16 payload convention for half-width min/max-num behavior.

Decodes V_ADD_F32, V_SUB_F32, V_SUBREV_F32, V_MUL_F32, and V_MIN/MAX_NUM_F32 from ENC_VOP2 on the same binary vector path, using the current local F32 payload path without widening the shared/common surface.

Decodes V_MUL_DX9_ZERO_F32 and V_FMAC_F32 from ENC_VOP2 on the same local F32 binary path, with V_MUL_DX9_ZERO_F32 preserving DX9 zero semantics and V_FMAC_F32 using a read/write vector destination descriptor for the accumulator operand.

Decodes V_ADD_F64, V_MUL_F64, and V_MIN/MAX_NUM_F64 from ENC_VOP2 with architecture-local wide source and destination descriptors for VGPR pairs, keeping the current wide local path architecture-local.
Decodes V_XNOR_B32 and V_MUL/MUL_HI_I32_I24/U32_U24 from ENC_VOP2 on the same 32-bit binary vector path, using the imported 24-bit operand interpretation without widening the shared/common surface.
Decodes V_LSHLREV_B64 from ENC_VOP2 with a 32-bit shift-count source, a wide 64-bit vector source, and a wide VGPR-pair destination on the current local path.

Decodes V_ADD_CO_CI_U32, V_SUB_CO_CI_U32, and V_SUBREV_CO_CI_U32 from ENC_VOP2 with an explicit VGPR destination, explicit data sources, and implicit wave32-local VCC source/destination operands on the current carry-chain path.
Decodes V_ADD_U32, V_SUB_U32, V_SUBREV_U32, V_MIN/MAX_I32, V_MIN/MAX_U32, V_CNDMASK_B32, V_LSHRREV_B32, V_ASHRREV_I32, V_LSHLREV_B32, V_AND_B32, V_OR_B32, and V_XOR_B32 from ENC_VOP2.
Decodes V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I32, V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_U32, V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I32, and V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_U32 from ENC_VOPC with SGPR, VGPR, inline, and literal sources.

Decodes V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I16/U16 and V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I16/U16 from ENC_VOPC on the same selector path, reusing the shared implicit VCC destination model while keeping the current wave32-local compare surface architecture-local.

Decodes V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I64/U64 and V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I64/U64 on the same ENC_VOPC path, using architecture-local wide source descriptors for SGPR/VGPR register pairs while keeping the shared implicit VCC destination model.

Decodes the local F16 VOPC float/class subset on the same phase-0 path, reusing the shared implicit VCC destination model while keeping the current wave32-local compare surface architecture-local: V_CMP_CLASS_F16, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F16, V_CMPX_CLASS_F16, and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F16.

Decodes the full local F32 VOPC float/class subset currently present in the phase-0 seed from ENC_VOPC: V_CMP_CLASS_F32, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F32, V_CMPX_CLASS_F32, and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F32.

Decodes the local F64 VOPC float/class subset on the same phase-0 path, using architecture-local wide source descriptors for SGPR/VGPR register pairs while keeping the shared implicit VCC destination model: V_CMP_CLASS_F64, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F64, V_CMPX_CLASS_F64, and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F64.
Sign-extends SIMM16 for S_MOVK_I32.

Decodes GLOBAL_LOAD_U8, GLOBAL_LOAD_I8, GLOBAL_LOAD_U16, GLOBAL_LOAD_I16, GLOBAL_LOAD_B32, GLOBAL_LOAD_B64, GLOBAL_LOAD_B96, GLOBAL_LOAD_B128, GLOBAL_LOAD_ADDTID_B32, GLOBAL_LOAD_BLOCK, GLOBAL_LOAD_TR_B64, GLOBAL_LOAD_TR_B128, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_U8, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_I8, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_B16, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_HI_U8, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_HI_I8, GLOBAL_LOAD_D16_HI_B16, GLOBAL_STORE_B8, GLOBAL_STORE_B16, GLOBAL_STORE_B32, GLOBAL_STORE_B64, GLOBAL_STORE_B96, GLOBAL_STORE_B128, GLOBAL_STORE_ADDTID_B32, GLOBAL_STORE_BLOCK, GLOBAL_STORE_D16_HI_B8, and GLOBAL_STORE_D16_HI_B16 from ENC_VGLOBAL on the current real path, combining the existing VADDR plus scalar SADDR plus inline offset forms with the narrower lane-id-scaled ADDTID addressing forms and the new M0-bitmask BLOCK forms.

Decodes the current 32-bit integer GLOBAL atomic slice from ENC_VGLOBAL on the same real path: GLOBAL_ATOMIC_SWAP_B32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_CMPSWAP_B32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_ADD_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_SUB_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_SUB_CLAMP_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MIN_I32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MIN_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MAX_I32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MAX_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_AND_B32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_OR_B32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_XOR_B32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_INC_U32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_DEC_U32, and GLOBAL_ATOMIC_COND_SUB_U32, reusing the existing VADDR plus scalar SADDR plus inline offset form without broadening the local vector-memory route.

Decodes the current 64-bit integer GLOBAL atomic slice from ENC_VGLOBAL on the same real path: GLOBAL_ATOMIC_SWAP_B64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_CMPSWAP_B64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_ADD_U64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_SUB_U64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MIN_I64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MIN_U64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MAX_I64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MAX_U64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_AND_B64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_OR_B64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_XOR_B64, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_INC_U64, and GLOBAL_ATOMIC_DEC_U64, using wide VGPR-pair destinations and wide vector data operands while keeping the local VADDR plus scalar SADDR plus inline offset route architecture-local.

Decodes the current F32 GLOBAL atomic slice from ENC_VGLOBAL on the same real path: GLOBAL_ATOMIC_ADD_F32, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MIN_NUM_F32, and GLOBAL_ATOMIC_MAX_NUM_F32, reusing the same 32-bit VADDR plus scalar SADDR plus inline offset form without widening the local vector-memory route.

Decodes the remaining packed-half and ordered-add GLOBAL atomic slice from ENC_VGLOBAL on the same real path: GLOBAL_ATOMIC_PK_ADD_F16, GLOBAL_ATOMIC_PK_ADD_BF16, and GLOBAL_ATOMIC_ORDERED_ADD_B64, reusing the existing 32-bit packed-data and wide 64-bit atomic forms without broadening the local vector-memory route.

Decodes the current local ENC_VDS one-address LDS slice on the real path: DS_NOP, the non-return update ops DS_ADD_F32, DS_ADD_U32, DS_SUB_U32, DS_RSUB_U32, DS_INC_U32, DS_DEC_U32, DS_COND_SUB_U32, DS_SUB_CLAMP_U32, DS_PK_ADD_F16, DS_PK_ADD_BF16, DS_MIN_I32, DS_MIN_U32, DS_MAX_I32, DS_MAX_U32, DS_AND_B32, DS_OR_B32, and DS_XOR_B32, the matching return-value ops DS_ADD_RTN_F32, DS_ADD_RTN_U32, DS_SUB_RTN_U32, DS_RSUB_RTN_U32, DS_INC_RTN_U32, DS_DEC_RTN_U32, DS_COND_SUB_RTN_U32, DS_SUB_CLAMP_RTN_U32, DS_PK_ADD_RTN_F16, DS_PK_ADD_RTN_BF16, DS_MIN_RTN_I32, DS_MIN_RTN_U32, DS_MAX_RTN_I32, DS_MAX_RTN_U32, DS_AND_RTN_B32, DS_OR_RTN_B32, and DS_XOR_RTN_B32, the simple one-address load ops DS_LOAD_B32, DS_LOAD_B64, DS_LOAD_B96, DS_LOAD_B128, DS_LOAD_I8, DS_LOAD_U8, DS_LOAD_I16, DS_LOAD_U16, DS_LOAD_U8_D16, DS_LOAD_U8_D16_HI, DS_LOAD_I8_D16, DS_LOAD_I8_D16_HI, DS_LOAD_U16_D16, and DS_LOAD_U16_D16_HI, plus the matching simple one-address store ops DS_STORE_B8, DS_STORE_B16, DS_STORE_B32, DS_STORE_B64, DS_STORE_B96, DS_STORE_B128, DS_STORE_B8_D16_HI, and DS_STORE_B16_D16_HI, using the current one-address LDS form with VADDR, DATA0 where applicable, VDST on the return/load path, and offset0 while rejecting GDS and offset1.
execution_capabilities: Halts waves with S_ENDPGM.
Accepts S_NOP as a no-op seed instruction.
Executes scalar compare and updates SCC across the local 32-bit signed and unsigned compare set.
Executes S_BRANCH, S_CBRANCH_SCC0, S_CBRANCH_SCC1, S_CBRANCH_VCCZ, S_CBRANCH_VCCNZ, S_CBRANCH_EXECZ, and S_CBRANCH_EXECNZ with relative instruction deltas.
Executes S_DCACHE_INV as a wave32-local no-op cache invalidation hint on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, establishing the first local ENC_SMEM foothold without widening shared memory state.

Executes S_PREFETCH_INST, S_PREFETCH_DATA, and S_BUFFER_PREFETCH_DATA as wave32-local no-op scalar-memory prefetch hints on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, extending the local ENC_SMEM foothold while keeping base-address memory semantics architecture-local.

Executes S_PREFETCH_INST_PC_REL and S_PREFETCH_DATA_PC_REL as wave32-local no-op scalar-memory prefetch hints on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, deepening the local ENC_SMEM foothold while keeping address semantics architecture-local.

Executes S_ATC_PROBE and S_ATC_PROBE_BUFFER as wave32-local no-op scalar cache-probe hints on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, extending the local ENC_SMEM foothold without committing to shared scalar-memory dataflow semantics.

Executes S_LOAD_B32, S_LOAD_B64, S_LOAD_B96, S_LOAD_B128, S_LOAD_B256, S_LOAD_B512, S_LOAD_I8, S_LOAD_U8, S_LOAD_I16, and S_LOAD_U16 as the current real wave32-local scalar-memory reads on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, using ExecutionMemory plus local sign/zero extension and wide sequential SGPR writes without widening shared scalar-memory state.

Executes S_BUFFER_LOAD_B32, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B64, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B96, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B128, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B256, S_BUFFER_LOAD_B512, S_BUFFER_LOAD_I8, S_BUFFER_LOAD_U8, S_BUFFER_LOAD_I16, and S_BUFFER_LOAD_U16 as the matching wave32-local buffer-backed scalar-memory reads on both the decoded and compiled seed paths, using the low 64 bits of the local 128-bit resource descriptor as a base address plus architecture-local ioffset/soffset address formation.
Executes scalar add/subtract and updates SCC using carry/borrow behavior.
Executes scalar move and scalar immediate move.
Normalizes gfx1201 execution to wave32 and clamps exec/vcc state to the low 32 lanes before running the local seed.
Executes V_NOP as a wave32-local no-op on both the decoded and compiled seed paths.
Executes V_PIPEFLUSH as a local no-op on both the decoded and compiled seed paths because the current phase-0 path has no vector pipeline model.
Executes exec-masked V_MOV_B32.
Executes exec-masked V_MOV_B16 and V_NOT_B16 while preserving the current local low-16-bit payload convention on the wave32 seed path.
Executes V_PERMLANE64_B32 as a wave32-local identity move on the current seed path, matching the imported RDNA4 no-op behavior for wave32 mode.
Executes exec-masked V_SWAP_B32 and V_SWAP_B16 by swapping full 32-bit values or low-16-bit payloads between the two explicit VGPR operands on the wave32 seed path.
Executes V_READFIRSTLANE_B32 by reading the lowest active lane in the wave32 exec mask and writing the selected value into an SGPR.

Executes wave32-local V_MOVRELD_B32, V_MOVRELS_B32, V_MOVRELSD_B32, V_MOVRELSD_2_B32, and V_SWAPREL_B32 by using M0[9:0] as the source relative offset and M0[25:16] as the destination relative offset for the *_2 and swap forms, while preserving inactive lanes and checking VGPR-relative bounds.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I32 and V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_U32 while preserving inactive-lane VCC bits.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I32 and V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_U32 and materializes the resulting active-lane compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I16/U16 using low-16-bit signed and unsigned compare semantics while preserving inactive-lane VCC bits.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I16/U16 and materializes the resulting active-lane 16-bit compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I64/U64 while preserving inactive-lane VCC bits, using architecture-local 64-bit signed and unsigned compare semantics on SGPR/VGPR register pairs.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_EQ/NE/LT/LE/GT/GE_I64/U64 and materializes the resulting active-lane compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_CLASS_F16, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F16, and preserves inactive-lane VCC bits on the non-CMPX path.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_CLASS_F16 and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F16 and materializes the resulting active-lane compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_CLASS_F32, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F32, and preserves inactive-lane VCC bits on the non-CMPX path.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_CLASS_F32 and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F32 and materializes the resulting active-lane compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_CMP_CLASS_F64, V_CMP_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F64, and preserves inactive-lane VCC bits on the non-CMPX path.
Executes exec-masked V_CMPX_CLASS_F64 and V_CMPX_EQ/GE/GT/LE/LG/LT/NEQ/O/U/NGE/NLG/NGT/NLE/NLT_F64 and materializes the resulting active-lane compare mask into both vcc_mask and exec_mask.
Executes exec-masked V_NOT_B32, V_BFREV_B32, V_CLS_I32, V_CLZ_I32_U32, V_CTZ_I32_B32, and V_CVT_F32_UBYTE0/1/2/3.
Executes exec-masked V_CVT_F32_I32, V_CVT_F32_U32, V_CVT_U32_F32, V_CVT_I32_F32, V_CVT_FLOOR_I32_F32, and V_CVT_NEAREST_I32_F32 with gfx950-consistent truncation and rounded-int conversion behavior.
Executes exec-masked V_CVT_F32_FP8 and V_CVT_F32_BF8 by expanding low-byte OCP E4M3 and E5M2 payloads into F32 values on the current wave32-local path.
Executes exec-masked V_CVT_PK_F32_FP8 and V_CVT_PK_F32_BF8 by expanding low/high packed 8-bit OCP payloads into a 2xF32 VGPR pair result on the current wave32-local path.
Executes exec-masked V_CVT_OFF_F32_I4 lane-wise using the imported 16-entry signed 4-bit offset table.
Executes exec-masked V_CVT_F32_F16, V_CVT_F16_F32, V_CVT_F16_I16, and V_CVT_F16_U16, bridging between F16 low-16-bit payloads and full 32-bit values on the current wave32-local path.
